name: Ubiquiti Access Door Hub Mini
title: Ubiquiti Access Door Hub Mini
short_description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Access Door Hub Mini (UA-Hub-Door-Mini) is a streamlined access control hub designed for single-door management. Equipped with three Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 ports, the UA-Hub-Door-Mini offers flexible networking capabilities. It supports PoE++ (50V DC, 1A) for power input, simplifying installation by reducing the need for additional wiring.
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Access Door Hub Mini (UA-Hub-Door-Mini) is a streamlined access control hub designed for single-door management. Equipped with three Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 ports, the UA-Hub-Door-Mini offers flexible networking capabilities. It supports PoE++ (50V DC, 1A) for power input, simplifying installation by reducing the need for additional wiring. The hub consumes up to 19W of maximum power without PoE output and up to 50W with PoE output, providing sufficient power for connected devices.

detailed_description.heading: Access Control Solution
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi Access Door Hub Mini (UA-Hub-Door-Mini) is a streamlined access control hub designed for single-door management. Equipped with three Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 ports, the UA-Hub-Door-Mini offers flexible networking capabilities. It supports PoE++ (50V DC, 1A) for power input, simplifying installation by reducing the need for additional wiring. The hub consumes up to 19W of maximum power without PoE output and up to 50W with PoE output, providing sufficient power for connected devices.

detailed_description.heading: Comprehensive Features
detailed_description.text: Additionally, it features two PoE ports with a combined output of 31W, allowing for the connection of UniFi Access Readers or Protect Cameras, thereby enhancing the security infrastructure. Its compact dimensions of 113 x 66 x 27.6 mm and lightweight build of 190 grams make it ideal for installations where space is limited. The hub's enclosure, crafted from durable polycarbonate and metal, ensures longevity and resilience in various environments. This design facilitates a neat and efficient setup, catering to both aesthetic and functional requirements.

detailed_description.heading: Comprehensive Features
detailed_description.text: The UA-Hub-Door-Mini is designed to manage various access control components effectively. It includes a lock terminal that is switchable between 12V (for certain types of locks) and dry contact (works with locks or systems that don't need power from the device), accommodating different locking mechanisms. The hub also provides input terminals for a request-to-exit device and a door position sensor, enabling comprehensive monitoring and control of door access. These features ensure that the hub can be integrated seamlessly into existing security systems, providing a robust solution for access management.

detailed_description.heading: Easy Integration
detailed_description.text: The UA-Hub-Door-Mini features a factory-reset button and a contact-only / power switch, simplifying configuration and maintenance tasks. The hub's LED indicators, displaying white and blue colors, provide clear status updates, aiding in quick diagnostics and system monitoring. Its compact and efficient design ensures that installation is straightforward, making it a practical choice for various access control applications, including small offices, retail stores, and residential properties.
